Deprecated API

Contents

  • Interfaces
  • Classes
  • Methods
  • Deprecated Interfaces
    Interface
    Description
    com.here.platform.data.client.base.http.IOExecutionContext
    please use ioExecutorService parameter of BaseClient instead. Since HERE SDK greater than or equal 2.28.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.AdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.NavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.RoadAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
  • Deprecated Classes
    Class
    Description
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes
    This object is not supported anymore. Please use dedicated instances of LayerType. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.EdgeNavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.PointAdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.RangeAdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.RangeNavigationAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.compilation.heremapcontent.RangeRoadAttributeDescription
    Use TopologyAttributeDescription instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.core.geospatial.ClosestResultPerKey
    Use `ClosestResultPerElement` instead. Since Location Library 1.2.2.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.AdvancedNavigationAttributesLayer
    Use TopologyAttributesLayer instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.AdvancedNavigationAttributes
    Use TopologyAttributes.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.NavigationAttributes
    Use TopologyAttributes.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.RoadAttributes
    Use TopologyAttributes.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.NavigationAttributesLayer
    Use TopologyAttributesLayer instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.RoadAttributesLayer
    Use TopologyAttributesLayer instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
  • Deprecated Methods
    Method
    Description
    com.here.platform.data.client.base.http.IOExecutionContext.prepare()
    preparation of ExecutionContexts will be removed. Since Scala 2.12.0.
    com.here.platform.data.client.javadsl.NewPartition.additionalMetadata()
    This field is not supported anymore. Please use the other available fields instead. Since OLP SDK > 2.1.
    com.here.platform.data.client.javadsl.NewPartition.Builder.withAdditionalMetadata(Optional<String>)
    This field is not supported anymore. Please use the other available fields instead. Since OLP SDK > 2.1.
    com.here.platform.data.client.javadsl.Partition.getAdditionalMetadata()
    This field is not supported anymore. Please use the other available fields instead. Since OLP SDK > 2.1.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.areaScheme()
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use `DataSubsetsApi` to set areaScheme in the data subset instead.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.Builder.withAreaScheme(HRN)
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use `DataSubsetsApi` to set areaScheme in the data subset instead.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.Builder.withSubsetRestrictions(Boolean)
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use subsetRestrictions on the layer level only.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.getAreaScheme()
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use `DataSubsetsApi` to set areaScheme in the data subset instead.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.getSubsetRestrictions()
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use subsetRestrictions on the layer level only.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.CatalogConfiguration.subsetRestrictions()
    is deprecated on the catalog level. Use subsetRestrictions on the layer level only.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.Index()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use IndexLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isIndex. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.InteractiveMap()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use InteractiveMapLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isInteractive. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.ObjectStore()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use ObjectStoreLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isObjectstore. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.Stream()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use StreamLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isStream. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.Versioned()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use VersionedLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isVersioned. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.model.LayerTypes.Volatile()
    This value is not supported anymore. For instantiation please use VolatileLayerType. For comparison please use LayerType.isVolatile. Since 1.18.xxx.
    com.here.platform.data.client.service.config.ConfigService.getSubset(HRN, String, InternalSettings)
    This method is deprecated. Use getDataSubset instead.
    com.here.platform.data.client.service.config.ConfigService.getSubsets(HRN, Option<Object>, Option<Seq<String>>, InternalSettings)
    This method is deprecated. Use getDataSubsets instead.
    com.here.platform.data.client.service.config.ConfigService.getSubsetsFingerprint(HRN, InternalSettings)
    This method is deprecated. Use getDataSubsetsFingerprint instead.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalog.VersionedLayerReadersConfigurationBuilder.withAdvancedNavigationAttributes(Seq<AdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalog.VersionedLayerReadersConfigurationBuilder.withNavigationAttributes(Seq<NavigationAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalog.VersionedLayerReadersConfigurationBuilder.withRoadAttributes(Seq<RoadAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalogDsl.CanSetCacheSizesAndAttributes.withAdvancedNavigationAttributes(Seq<AdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalogDsl.CanSetCacheSizesAndAttributes.withNavigationAttributes(Seq<NavigationAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.javadsl.OptimizedMapCatalogDsl.CanSetCacheSizesAndAttributes.withRoadAttributes(Seq<RoadAttributeDescription>)
    Use withTopologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.OptimizedMapVersionedLayers.advancedNavigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.OptimizedMapVersionedLayers.navigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.dcl2.OptimizedMapVersionedLayers.roadAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.advancedNavigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes().
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.navigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes().
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.graph.javadsl.PropertyMaps.roadAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes().
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.OptimizedMapLayers.advancedNavigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.OptimizedMapLayers.navigationAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.OptimizedMapLayers.roadAttributes()
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.advancedNavigationAttributes(InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.advancedNavigationAttributes(Seq<AdvancedNavigationAttributeDescription>, InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.navigationAttributes(InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.navigationAttributes(Seq<NavigationAttributeDescription>, InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.roadAttributes(InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
    com.here.platform.location.integration.optimizedmap.TileDecoders.roadAttributes(Seq<RoadAttributeDescription>, InputStream)
    Use topologyAttributes instead. Since Location Library 1.0.54.
